trans-unit.source: Authenticating with Azure...
trans-unit.target: Authenticating with Azure...

trans-unit.source: Failed to authenticate with Azure. Please ensure you are logged in with 'az login' or have valid credentials configured.
trans-unit.target: Failed to authenticate with Azure. Please ensure you are logged in with 'az login' or have valid credentials configured.

trans-unit.source: Import Azure resources from a live resource group into an Aspire AppHost project
trans-unit.target: Import Azure resources from a live resource group into an Aspire AppHost project

trans-unit.source: The Bicep CLI was not found. Install it from https://learn.microsoft.com/azure/azure-resource-manager/bicep/install or use 'az bicep install'.
trans-unit.target: The Bicep CLI was not found. Install it from https://learn.microsoft.com/azure/azure-resource-manager/bicep/install or use 'az bicep install'.

trans-unit.target: Failed to compile Bicep file: {0}

trans-unit.target: Failed to import Bicep resources: {0}

trans-unit.target: Import Azure resources from Bicep files into an Aspire AppHost project

trans-unit.target: Compiling Bicep to ARM template...

trans-unit.target: Compute resource '{0}' detected — a placeholder will be generated.

trans-unit.target: Import {0} resources to '{1}'?

trans-unit.target: Import infrastructure resources into an Aspire AppHost project

trans-unit.target: Discovering resources...

trans-unit.target: Generating AppHost project...

trans-unit.source: Successfully imported {0} resources into {1}
trans-unit.target: Successfully imported {0} resources into {1}

trans-unit.source: Import mode: 'existing' references pre-deployed resources with .AsExisting(), 'new' generates fresh Add*() calls for Aspire-managed provisioning
trans-unit.target: Import mode: 'existing' references pre-deployed resources with .AsExisting(), 'new' generates fresh Add*() calls for Aspire-managed provisioning

trans-unit.target: The name for the generated AppHost project

trans-unit.target: No resources were found in the selected source.
